title: UT Tyler Career and Internship Preparation Checklist
ideas_used: Create resume and cover letter
Build LinkedIn profile
Begin e-portfolio
Practice interviewing
Apply and attend career events

title: NACE Career Readiness Competencies
ideas_used: Career self-development
Communication
Critical thinking
Professionalism
Teamwork
Technology

title: Oregon State University: Using the STAR Method for Interviews
ideas_used: Use STAR for behavioral answers
Match interview preparation to a job description
Prepare concise stories from experience

title: CSULB Internship Interview Prep Workbook
ideas_used: Behavioral questions ask for past examples
Use Situation, Task, Action, Result
Prepare internship stories

title: Tech Interview Handbook
ideas_used: Coding interview evaluates communication, problem solving, technical competency, and testing
Practice technical questions systematically
Prepare self-introduction

title: University of Georgia Application Follow-Up Template
ideas_used: Attach resume and cover letter when following up
Professional follow-up communication can support applications

title: Concordia University Irvine General Internship Guide
ideas_used: Following up after application can show professionalism and interest
Thank-you email after interview
Track and communicate during the application process

title: UIUC CS+CPSC Student Portfolio on GitHub
ideas_used: Use GitHub to showcase projects
Create repositories that demonstrate project work

title: so-you-want-an-internship GitHub repository
ideas_used: Prepare side projects
Set up GitHub
Review data structures and algorithms basics

title: json-rules-engine GitHub repository
ideas_used: Rules can be expressed in readable JSON
Rules can use ALL and ANY logic operators

title: python-rule-engine GitHub repository
ideas_used: Python rule engines can evaluate rules defined in JSON format
Separating rules from engine code improves maintainability

title: Pyke Forward Chaining
ideas_used: Forward chaining starts with known facts
Rules fire and add new facts until no more rules can fire

title: Streamlit GitHub repository
ideas_used: Streamlit supports fast local interactive prototypes
Widgets, columns, tabs, and dataframes help demonstrate decision support systems

title: Streamlit documentation
ideas_used: Use local widgets, tabs, expanders, and dataframe views for a simple Expert System interface

title: BLS Occupational Outlook Handbook: Computer and Information Technology Occupations
ideas_used: Used broad IT occupation families such as software, web, security, database, systems analyst, and support roles.

topic: Software engineering and QA internship role track
title: BLS Occupational Outlook Handbook: Software Developers, Quality Assurance Analysts, and Testers
ideas_used: Mapped programming, software design, testing, problem solving, communication, and teamwork signals to software/QA role recommendations.

topic: Data science and AI internship role track
title: BLS Occupational Outlook Handbook: Data Scientists
ideas_used: Mapped data analysis, algorithms, visualization, programming, database/statistical skills, and communication to data/AI role recommendations.

title: BLS Occupational Outlook Handbook: Information Security Analysts
ideas_used: Mapped security monitoring, vulnerability awareness, reporting, and IT fundamentals to cybersecurity role recommendations.

title: University of Kansas Career Center: Information Systems
ideas_used: Used information systems career paths such as systems analysis, computer support, database management, and information security.

title: Texas A&M University Career Center: Management Information Systems
ideas_used: Mapped MIS/business-technology preparation to business analyst, IT analyst, consultant, software analyst, and web developer role ideas.

title: Wisconsin School of Business: Information Systems Major
ideas_used: Used listed IS jobs and career paths including business analyst, database administrator, IT analyst, systems analyst, BI and data roles.

topic: Data science major career paths and job search
title: University of Michigan Career Center: Data Science Track
ideas_used: Used common entry titles such as data analyst, business analyst, machine learning engineer, data engineer, and advice to read job descriptions carefully.

title: MyNext by TalentCorp Malaysia
ideas_used: Used as a Malaysia structured internship and career exploration platform in job platform recommendations.

title: JobStreet Malaysia Internships Jobs
ideas_used: Used as a Malaysia internship search platform with ICT classification and internship filters.

title: Hiredly Internships Malaysia
ideas_used: Used as a Malaysia internship platform where students can upload a resume and search by title or company.

title: LinkedIn Jobs
ideas_used: Used as a global job and internship platform for role keyword searches, alerts, and professional networking.

title: Prosple Malaysia
ideas_used: Used as a student/fresh graduate platform with internship categories such as IT, cyber security, and data analyst.

title: Handshake Help Center: Searching for Jobs and Internships
ideas_used: Used as a reference for university career portals, saved searches, and job alerts when students have access.

title: BLS Occupational Outlook Handbook: Occupation Groups
ideas_used: Used BLS occupation groups to expand the knowledge base beyond computing into business, engineering, media, education, healthcare, legal, science, social service, arts/design, and logistics-related role families.

topic: Business, accounting, finance, HR, market research, logistics
title: BLS Occupational Outlook Handbook: Business and Financial Occupations
ideas_used: Mapped accounting, finance, market research, HR, procurement, logistics, and analyst-style internship tracks.

title: BLS Occupational Outlook Handbook: Architecture and Engineering Occupations
ideas_used: Mapped engineering, electrical/electronic, mechanical, civil, manufacturing, quality, and built environment internship tracks.

topic: Management, operations, marketing, HR, hospitality and events
title: BLS Occupational Outlook Handbook: Management Occupations
ideas_used: Mapped business operations, project coordination, marketing, HR, hospitality operations, and event management role tracks.

title: BLS Occupational Outlook Handbook: Logisticians
ideas_used: Mapped logistics, supply chain, warehouse operations, procurement, and logistics analyst internship suggestions.

title: University of Maine Career Center: What Can I Do With This Major?
ideas_used: Used broad university major categories such as accounting, communication, finance, law, marketing, psychology, and engineering to expand major choices.

title: Texas Tech University Career Center: What Can I Do With This Major?
ideas_used: Used broad major-to-career exploration categories as a public reference for expanding professional tracks.

title: Towson University: Career Resources by Major
ideas_used: Used the idea that career resources can include common career titles, internship opportunities, job search websites, resumes, and interview questions by field.

title: Middle Tennessee State University: What Can I Do With A Major In?
ideas_used: Used the caution that students work in careers, not majors, and that some careers accept many majors; the system therefore recommends role targets rather than guaranteeing a career.

title: University of Kansas Career Center: Careers
ideas_used: Used the idea that many careers do not require one specific major and employers often value experience, skills, interests, and abilities.

topic: Psychology and social science career mapping
title: University of Michigan Career Center: Psychology
ideas_used: Mapped psychology skills such as research, analysis, interpersonal skills, and communication to human services, research, HR, education, and community roles.

title: Georgetown University: What Can I Do with My Psychology Major?
ideas_used: Used psychology skills and cross-industry options such as human relations, management, consulting, advertising, business, and marketing.

title: gradmalaysia: Find Jobs & Internships
ideas_used: Added gradmalaysia as a broad Malaysia internship platform for business, engineering, marketing, sustainability, and other student opportunities.
